summary: Aggregated cost summary across all tenants

field_descriptions.total_cost: Total cost across all accessible tenants for the period
field_descriptions.period_start: Start date of the cost period (YYYY-MM-DD)
field_descriptions.period_end: End date of the cost period (YYYY-MM-DD)
field_descriptions.tenant_count: Number of tenants included in the summary
field_descriptions.cost_change_percent: Percentage change compared to previous period
field_descriptions.top_services: Top 3 services by cost with percentage breakdown
